description: Claude Code IDE - Module structure and IPC communication map

getWindowStatePath.purpose: Get path for persisted window state

createSplash.purpose: Uses a data URL with inline HTML/CSS — no file I/O, no network, no blocking.

initModulesWithWindow.purpose: Initialize modules that need window reference

init.purpose: Initialize PTY module with window reference

getMenuTemplate.purpose: Get menu template based on active AI tool

buildAICommandsSubmenu.purpose: Build AI commands submenu based on active tool

openHistoryFile.purpose: Open history file in default editor

getTasksFilePath.purpose: Get tasks file path for a project

watchTasksFile.purpose: Start watching tasks file for external changes

isFrameProject.purpose: Check if a project is a SubFrame project

initializeFrameProject.purpose: Delegates to the shared projectInit module, then updates workspace state.

ensureWorkspaceDir.purpose: Ensure workspace directory and file exist

renameProject.purpose: Rename a project in the workspace

scanProjectDir.purpose: Returns array of { path, name, isFrameProject, source: 'scanned' }

getProjectsWithScanned.purpose: Manual projects take priority over scanned duplicates

initCritical.purpose: Initialize critical-path modules (visible UI, layout, interaction)

initDeferred.purpose: Runs after the first paint so it doesn't block the UI.

restartTerminal.purpose: Restart terminal with new path (creates new terminal in path for current project)

sendCommand.purpose: Send command to active terminal or specific terminal

focus.purpose: Focus file tree for keyboard navigation

getVisibleItems.purpose: Get all visible file items (for navigation)

handleKeydown.purpose: Handle keyboard navigation in file tree

isHistoryVisible.purpose: Check if history panel is visible

setMultiTerminalUI.purpose: Set MultiTerminalUI reference for terminal session management

setProjectPath.purpose: Set project path and switch terminal session

onFrameStatusChange.purpose: Register callback for SubFrame status change

onFrameInitialized.purpose: Register callback for SubFrame project initialized

initializeAsFrameProject.purpose: Initialize current project as SubFrame project

showInitSpotlight.purpose: Show spotlight tour for the initialize button (first time only)

dismissSpotlight.purpose: Dismiss spotlight and mark as seen

getToastIcon.purpose: Get toast icon based on type

sendTaskToClaude.purpose: Send task to Claude Code via terminal

setClaudeRunning.purpose: Mark Claude Code as running (called from external modules)

isClaudeRunning.purpose: Check if Claude Code is marked as running

_startRename.purpose: Start inline rename on a project item

_createContextMenu.purpose: Create the right-click context menu element

_showContextMenu.purpose: Show context menu at position for a project item

confirmRemoveProject.purpose: Show confirmation dialog and remove project

selectProject.purpose: Terminal session switching is handled by state.js via multiTerminalUI

focus.purpose: Focus project list for keyboard navigation

handleKeydown.purpose: Handle keyboard navigation in project list

getDateString.purpose: Get current date in YYYY-MM-DD format

getAgentsTemplate.purpose: This file is read by AI coding tools (Claude Code, Codex CLI, etc.)

getCodexWrapperTemplate.purpose: Instructs Codex to read AGENTS.md as initial prompt

getGenericWrapperTemplate.purpose: Can be customized for other AI tools in the future

getNativeFileTemplate.purpose: Returns just the backlink block that references AGENTS.md

getPreCommitHookTemplate.purpose: Bash script that detects staged JS files in src/ and runs the updater script.

getHookUpdaterScript.purpose: updates STRUCTURE.json with module info (exports, deps, functions).

init.purpose: Initialize PTY manager with window reference

getDefaultShell.purpose: Get default shell based on platform

getAvailableShells.purpose: Get available shells on the system

getTerminalsByProject.purpose: Get terminals for a specific project

toggle.purpose: If currently collapsed, goes to expanded.

hide.purpose: ── Backward-compat public API (used by index.js tab handler) ──

getMarketplacePlugins.purpose: Get all available plugins from marketplace

getAllPlugins.purpose: Get all plugins with their status

refreshMarketplace.purpose: Refresh marketplace plugins (git pull or clone)

getPluginIcon.purpose: Get icon for plugin based on name

getToastIcon.purpose: Get toast icon based on type

resumeSession.purpose: Uses the configured AI tool command by default.

showResumeDropdown.purpose: Show resume dropdown with command options

showCustomCommandPrompt.purpose: Show a simple inline prompt for custom command

formatRelativeTime.purpose: Format a date string to relative time

checkGhCli.purpose: Check if gh CLI is available

checkGitHubRepo.purpose: Check if current directory is a git repo with GitHub remote

loadIssues.purpose: Load GitHub issues for current project

renderComingSoon.purpose: Render coming soon state for unimplemented tabs

getContrastColor.purpose: Get contrasting text color for a background color

getToastIcon.purpose: Get toast icon based on type

init.purpose: Initialize the module with window reference

extractToken.purpose: Extract access token from a parsed credentials object

getTokenFromCredentialsFile.purpose: Used on Windows and Linux where macOS Keychain is unavailable

getTokenFromKeychain.purpose: Read OAuth token from macOS Keychain

getOAuthToken.purpose: - All platforms: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var as final fallback

fetchUsage.purpose: Fetch usage data from Claude OAuth API

startPolling.purpose: Start periodic polling for usage updates

loadOverview.purpose: Load overview data for a project

loadStats.purpose: Load project stats (lines of code, files, git info)

findFilesRecursive.purpose: Recursively find files matching an extension (cross-platform)

countLinesOfCode.purpose: Count lines of code in src directory (cross-platform)

getFileGitHistory.purpose: Get file git history (contributors, commits, blame)

getFileCommits.purpose: Get recent commits for a file

getFileBlame.purpose: Cross-platform: parses git blame output in Node.js instead of piping through Unix commands

structureToGraph.purpose: Convert structure data to graph format

buildHierarchy.purpose: Build hierarchy data for D3 tree

showModuleInfo.purpose: Show module info in panel (1x3 grid layout)

loadAndShowGitHistory.purpose: Load and show git history for a module

renderGitHistory.purpose: Render git history HTML (compact card format)

isWorkingTreeClean.purpose: Check if working tree is clean

getCustomCommand.purpose: Get custom command override from settings for a tool

getStartCommand.purpose: Get the start command for active tool

updateUI.purpose: Update UI to reflect current tool

getStartCommand.purpose: Get the start command for current tool

getCommand.purpose: Get a specific command for current tool

supportsFeature.purpose: Check if current tool supports a feature

extractMessageText.purpose: Handles string messages, {content: string}, and {content: [{type, text}]} formats.

parseSessionFile.purpose: Parse a single .jsonl session file and extract metadata

getSessionsForProject.purpose: Get sessions for a given project path

getAIFilesStatus.purpose: Get status of all AI-related files in a project

handleInjectBacklink.purpose: Inject backlink into a native AI file

handleRemoveBacklink.purpose: Remove backlink from a native AI file

handleCreateNativeFile.purpose: Create a new native AI file with backlink

handleMigrateSymlink.purpose: Migrate a symlink to a real file with backlink

handleVerifyOnProjectOpen.purpose: Non-blocking — sends results to the renderer for display

buildBacklinkOptions.purpose: Build backlink options from config (returns undefined if no customization)

handleUpdateAllBacklinks.purpose: Update all existing backlinks in a project with current config

setupIPC.purpose: Setup IPC handlers for AI file operations

updateSetting.purpose: Update a setting by key path (e.g. 'aiTools.claude.customCommand')

getSetting.purpose: Get a setting by key path

runVerification.purpose: Trigger backlink verification for the current project

setupIPCListeners.purpose: Setup IPC listeners for status updates

loadStatus.purpose: Load AI files status for the current project

renderVerificationSection.purpose: Shows color-coded issues from the last verification run

renderClaudeSettingsSection.purpose: SubFrame never touches .claude/ — it belongs to Claude Code.

getStatusDisplay.purpose: Get display info for a file status

wireActionButtons.purpose: Wire up action button click handlers

wireBacklinkCustomizeButtons.purpose: Wire up event handlers for backlink customize form

loadSettings.purpose: Load settings and AI tool config

bindActionListeners.purpose: Bind action button listeners after render

getToastIcon.purpose: Get toast icon based on type

hasBacklink.purpose: Check if a file already contains the backlink marker

injectBacklink.purpose: If file exists but has no backlink, prepends the block.

updateBacklink.purpose: If no backlink exists, injects one at the top instead.

removeBacklink.purpose: Remove the backlink block from a file, preserving all other content

isSymlinkFile.purpose: Check if a file is a symlink

getNativeFileStatus.purpose: Get the status of a native AI file (CLAUDE.md, GEMINI.md)

getClaudeNativeStatus.purpose: This is read-only detection for user awareness in the AI Files panel.

getBacklinkTarget.purpose: Parses the markdown link inside the SUBFRAME markers to find the referenced file

verifyNativeFile.purpose: Verify a single native AI file's backlink status

collectNativeFileIssues.purpose: Collect issues for a native AI file and push them to the result

verifyBacklinks.purpose: Checks AGENTS.md existence, native file backlinks, and target validity

createFileIfNotExists.purpose: Create file if it doesn't exist

createOrMigrateNativeFile.purpose: Handles symlink migration and idempotent backlink injection.

checkExistingFiles.purpose: Check which SubFrame files already exist in the project

RESTART_TERMINAL.name: restart-terminal
RESTART_TERMINAL.description: Restart PTY with new working directory

TERMINAL_OUTPUT.name: terminal-output
TERMINAL_OUTPUT.description: PTY output to display in terminal

CHECK_FRAME_PROJECT.name: check-frame-project
CHECK_FRAME_PROJECT.description: Check if directory is a Frame project

circularDependencies.issue: esbuild bundler renames modules when circular dependencies exist (e.g., terminal → terminal2)
circularDependencies.solution: Use window.terminalSendCommand global function instead of direct import
circularDependencies.pattern: Expose functions on window object for cross-module communication that would cause circular deps

ipcVsGlobal.useGlobal: For renderer ↔ renderer communication that would cause circular dependency
